display.purpose: Page-level headings — workspace names, major section titles. At most once per view.

title.purpose: Card headings, panel labels, sidebar section names.

body.purpose: Default text across all data-dense surfaces, tables, lists. Max 72ch line length.

label.purpose: Form labels, metadata tags, column headers. Not uppercase.

mono.purpose: Sensor readings, node IDs, timestamps, numeric values, model parameters. Geist Mono exclusively.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Floating elements only: dropdowns, modals, tooltips, command palettes. Never on static cards.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus, color shifts).

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Interactive feedback: button hover, input focus border.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button. One per primary action zone. Signal Blue background.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background-color: oklch(0.55 0.18 250); color: oklch(0.99 0 0); font-family: Geist Sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 100ms; user-select: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: oklch(0.48 0.18 250); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.55 0.18 250); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.55 0.18 250 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-emphasis action. Used in toolbars, sidebar rows, icon-only controls.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background-color: transparent; color: oklch(0.15 0.02 250); font-family: Geist Sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: oklch(0.95 0.01 250); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.55 0.18 250); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.55 0.18 250 / 0.5); }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Irreversible actions only. Alarm Red at low opacity. Always paired with a destructive icon.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-destructive"><svg class="ds-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"/><path d="M19 6l-1 14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H8a2 2 0 0 1-2-2L5 6"/><path d="M10 11v6M14 11v6"/></svg>Delete</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; justify-content: center; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background-color: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 0.1); color: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325); font-family: Geist Sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms; } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background-color: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 0.18); } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 0.4); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 0.2); } .ds-btn-icon { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; flex-shrink: 0; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Primary surface container. Hairline ring border, no shadow, one tonal step above page background.
components.html:
Workspace Alpha
3 nodes · 1 alarm active
Content area
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 0.75rem; background-color: oklch(1 0 0); padding: 1rem 0; color: oklch(0.15 0.02 250); font-family: Geist Sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.15 0.02 250 / 0.10); } .ds-card-header { padding: 0 1rem; display: grid; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-card-title { font-weight: 500; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.5 0.02 250); } .ds-card-body { padding: 0 1rem; }

components.name: Input
components.description: Default text field. Transparent background, border-input stroke, Signal Blue focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { height: 2rem; width: 100%; min-width: 0; padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem; background-color: transparent; color: oklch(0.15 0.02 250); font-family: Geist Sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.92 0.01 250); outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.5 0.02 250); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.55 0.18 250); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.55 0.18 250 / 0.5); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Signature component. Communicates alarm/warning/offline/normal with color AND label — never color alone.
components.html: AlarmWarningOfflineNormal
components.css: .ds-status-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; height: 1.25rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Geist Sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-status-dot { width: 0.5rem; height: 0.5rem; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-status-alarm { background-color: rgba(239,68,68,0.10); color: #ef4444; } .ds-status-alarm .ds-status-dot { background-color: #ef4444; } .ds-status-warning { background-color: rgba(245,158,11,0.10); color: #f59e0b; } .ds-status-warning .ds-status-dot { background-color: #f59e0b; } .ds-status-offline { background-color: rgba(113,113,122,0.10); color: #71717a; } .ds-status-offline .ds-status-dot { background-color: #71717a; } .ds-status-normal { background-color: rgba(16,185,129,0.10); color: #059669; } .ds-status-normal .ds-status-dot { background-color: #10b981; }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation row. Active state uses Signal Blue text + accent tint background.
components.html: OverviewAlerts3Workspaces
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.625rem; padding: 0.375rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; font-family: Geist Sans, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(0.18 0.02 250); text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 100ms, color 100ms; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background-color: oklch(0.92 0.02 250); } .ds-nav-item--active { background-color: oklch(0.92 0.02 250); color: oklch(0.55 0.18 250); font-weight: 500; } .ds-nav-icon { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-nav-badge { margin-left: auto; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem; padding: 0 0.25rem; border-radius: 9999px; background-color: #ef4444; color: #fff; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; }

narrative.overview:
SoftSensor's visual system is calibrated, not decorated. Like a high-end oscilloscope or industrial measurement device, every visual element earns its place through function. The surface steps back; the data reads forward. Status indicators are unmistakable. Typography prioritizes legibility. Whitespace is rationed, not squandered.

This system refuses the aesthetic of legacy SCADA/DCS software — the heavy chrome, the neon-on-black widget grids, the cluttered operator panels that look frozen in 1998. It equally refuses the warm consumer-SaaS softness of Notion or Airtable, and the assembled-from-widgets look of Grafana or Tableau. SoftSensor is purpose-built for domain experts who don't need hand-holding and distrust anything that looks like a demo.

The result looks like it was made by someone who actually understands industrial monitoring: spare, confident, fast to scan, impossible to misread.
keyCharacteristics: Signal Blue used only for active states and primary actions — never decoratively
Near-white / deep-navy dual-theme surfaces; zero warm-neutral tinting
Tonal layering over drop-shadows: depth via rings and background shifts
Geist Sans throughout; Geist Mono for data values, IDs, and sensor readings
Compact body at 0.875rem; data-density over breathing room
Status colors always paired with icon + label, never used decoratively

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Signal Blue is used on ≤15% of any given screen. Its rarity is how it communicates activity.

rules.name: The Status Contract
rules.body: Status colors (alarm/warning/offline/normal) are never used for decorative purposes. They communicate operating state that operators rely on.

rules.name: The Mono Contract
rules.body: Numeric sensor readings and identifiers are always rendered in Geist Mono.

rules.name: The Weight Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Maximum in-use font weight is 600 (semibold). Font-weight 700+ reads as alarmed.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: A shadow on a static card is a question mark. If the element isn't floating (modal, dropdown, detached), the shadow doesn't belong.

dos: Do use ring-1 ring-foreground/10 for card edge definition — never border or box-shadow on resting surfaces.
Do pair every status color with both an icon and a text label.
Do render all numeric sensor readings, IDs, timestamps, and model parameters in Geist Mono.
Do hold Signal Blue to ≤15% surface coverage per screen.
Do test both themes against WCAG 2.1 AA: 4.5:1 body/placeholder, 3:1 large text.
Do provide prefers-reduced-motion fallbacks for every animation.
Do keep maximum font weight at 600 (semibold).
Do anchor depth in tonal lightness steps, not shadows.
donts: Don't use legacy SCADA/DCS aesthetics: no heavy chrome, no neon-on-dark widgets, no Wonderware look.
Don't bring consumer-SaaS softness into the app: no pastel palette, no warm-tinted neutrals, no friendly blob empty states.
Don't produce an assembled-from-widgets dark-mode grid (Grafana/Tableau aesthetic).
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't use border-left/right > 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or list items.
Don't use glassmorphism or backdrop-filter: blur on resting surfaces.
Don't apply drop-shadows to resting static cards.
Don't use status colors for anything other than operating state.
Don't use font-weight 700 or higher anywhere in the UI.
